projectDescription: A modern 2D game engine for the web that lets you build games with create-fraxel, JSX syntax, fine-grained reactivity, Vite asset imports, and a custom canvas runtime with no React dependency.
recommendedLearningPath: Create a project with create-fraxel, preferably the empty template for learning material.
Use @fraxel/vite-plugin in Vite projects so static assets can be imported with ?texture and ?sound.
Use JSX nodes, components, native node hooks, signals, List, and public helpers for day-to-day game code.
Use runtime loadTexture/loadSound only for dynamic URLs, public/ assets, small embeds, or custom integrations.
Keep low-level Game.setup, SceneManager, GameConfig, and internals material in API, Development, or Internals documentation.
keyFeatures: create-fraxel scaffolding with empty, platformer, and top-down templates
Vite integration through @fraxel/vite-plugin with ?texture and ?sound asset imports
JSX-based scene graph compiled directly into engine nodes, with no React or Virtual DOM
Fine-grained reactivity via useSignal, createSignal, useComputed, and reactive JSX props
Typed native node hooks such as useSprite, useCollider, useRigidBody, useCamera, useAudio, useTimer, useGroup, and useView
Declarative scene registration with createGame, GameRoot, and SceneRoot
Small GameControls surface: play, pause, and destroy
Scene transitions through useScene().change(), useScene().preload(), and SceneManager.setScene() for low-level API use
Built-in collision system with rectangle, circle, and capsule shapes plus spatial hash broadphase
Physics simulation with gravity, rigid bodies, forces, impulses, friction, bounce, and collision response
Camera system with zoom, smoothing, offset, bounds, screen shake, and coordinate conversion
Sprite sheet animation with AnimationPlayer, animationFromSheet, keyframesFromSheet, and reactive animation switching
Audio playback through the audio node and useAudio, with Web Audio autoplay handling
Runtime asset pipeline with loadTexture, loadSound, loadBatch, loadBatchAsset, unloadTexture, and unloadSound
Input system with pointer tracking, keyboard actions, and axis helpers
Reactive List component for keyed dynamic node rendering
Sprite filters including brightness, grayscale, modulate, contrast, opacity, saturation, hue rotation, and invert
FraxelScript API for node-attached logic when component hooks are not the right fit
Development documentation for the monorepo, packages, local setup, create-fraxel, vite-plugin, and template testing
Internals documentation separated from user-facing guides

packages.name: fraxel
packages.description: Runtime engine, JSX runtime, nodes, hooks, reactivity, input, assets, animation, audio, collision, math, and scripts.

packages.name: create-fraxel
packages.description: CLI for creating new Fraxel projects from templates.

packages.name: @fraxel/vite-plugin
packages.description: Vite plugin that configures Fraxel JSX and transforms asset imports with ?texture and ?sound.

publicApiSurface: createGame(jsx, root) -> GameControls
GameControls.play() / pause() / destroy()
<GameRoot width height defaultScene testOptions pauseOnBlur pixelated> — root JSX configuration component
<SceneRoot name component> — scene definition component
<List array itemKey empty> — reactive keyed list rendering component
<Fragment> — group children without adding an engine node
<transform position rotation> — spatial container node
<sprite textureId source displaySize flipX flipY ...filters> — texture rendering node
<text text style> — canvas text rendering node
<geometry shape fillColor strokeColor strokeWidth> — primitive shape rendering node
<collider shape group collidesWith> — collision detection node
<body mass friction bounce isStatic useGravity> — rigid body physics node
<camera current zoom smoothing offset limit> — viewport control node
<animator animations currentAnim> — sprite animation player node
<audio soundId loop volume playbackRate persistUntilEnd> — audio playback node
<clickable size disabled> — pointer interaction node
<timer duration autoPlay> — timer node
<raycast direction collidesWith> — ray projection node
<group> — grouping node
<view> — view/HUD root node
<tilemap> — tilemap rendering node
useSignal(initial) -> [SignalGetter<T>, SignalSetter<T>]
createSignal(initial) -> [SignalGetter<T>, SignalSetter<T>]
useComputed(fn) -> SignalGetter<T>
useEffect(fn), useMount(fn), useUpdate(fn) — lifecycle and reactive effect hooks
useAction(action) and useActionAxis(negative, positive) — reactive input hooks
useScene() -> { getCurrent, change, preload }
useGame() — game loop control and focus triggers
usePaused() and useSize() — game state derived hooks
useContext(ctx), createContext(default) — context API
createTrigger(), useTrigger(trigger, callback) — pub/sub trigger API
useCondition(), useMatch(), useWhen() — derived reactivity helpers

useTransform(), useSprite(), useText(), useGeometry(), useCollider(), useRigidBody(), useCamera(), useClickable(), useRayCast(), useAnimation(), useAudio(), useTimer(), useGroup(), useView() — typed node reference hooks
NodeReference.node / signal / started / updated / drawed / destroyed / script() / spawn()
Node2DReference.position / setPosition() / rotation / setRotation()
Input.createAction({ key, ctrl?, shift?, alt? }) — bind keyboard action
Input.isActionPressed / justActionPressed / justActionUnpressed
Input.isKeyPressed / isJustKeyPressed / isJustKeyUnpressed
Input.pointerPosition / isPointerPressed
Input.getKeyAxis(positiveKey, negativeKey)
loadTexture(url) — runtime image asset loading with URL deduplication
loadSound(url) — runtime audio asset loading; 0.1.0-alpha.6d does not deduplicate sounds by URL
loadBatch(loaders, options) — parallel batch loader with progress
loadBatchAsset(type, urls, options) — typed batch loader
unloadTexture(id) / unloadSound(id) — free asset memory
@fraxel/vite-plugin asset imports: import tex from './sprite.png?texture'; import snd from './sound.ogg?sound'
PhysicsSystem.gravity — configure global gravity
tween(options), tweenValue(options), sequence(tweens), parallel(tweens) — tweening API
animationFromSheet(sprite, texture, options) and keyframesFromSheet(sprite, texture, columns, rows, range?)
shapes.rectangle / shapes.circle / shapes.capsule — collision shape factories
Vector2 / vector2(value) — 2D vector utilities
bounds(x, y, w, h) — axis-aligned bounding box
Color / color(...) — RGBA color utilities
FraxelScript<NodeType> — base class for node-attached game logic scripts
Game.setup(options), Game.play(), Game.pause(), Game.resume(), Game.destroy() — low-level game API
SceneManager.addScene(), SceneManager.setScene(), SceneManager.preloadScene() — low-level scene API
GameConfig — low-level canvas, dimensions, and test overlay configuration
getAudioContext() — access the Web Audio context
